authorityEffect: updates readiness and claim-limit posture; does not promote new RFCs, companion artifacts, or machine contracts
activeLawChangeScope: readiness/hostile-review baseline memo addenda only; no new truth model or runtime semantics
boundedActiveLayers: public surfaces, preflight/dry-run, result qualification, trace retrieval, public read-model and source-fidelity envelopes
sponsor-bound software-agent actorship and authority decision traces
agent run envelopes, traces, blocked-action traces, output dispositions, stop conditions, approval checkpoints, and handoff envelopes
capability/tool manifest honesty and claim limits
advisory-only world-model run/state contracts with uncertainty, validity, invalidation, reconciliation, and output disposition
EvidenceNeed and ObservationRequest request layer with burden/noise/display controls
synthetic farmer-value UX scenario conformance fixtures

executedConformanceEvidence.scope: selected synthetic hostile runtime stub; not full Phase 9 and not production runtime evidence
synthetic CP7 advisory world-model contract fixtures only; not runtime or production readiness
synthetic CP8 request-layer contract fixtures only; not farmer UX, runtime, or production readiness
synthetic farmer-value UX scenario conformance only; not live farmer validation, production readiness, or legal/compliance advice

allowedBoundedClaims: OFARM has a bounded active agentic AI governance contract layer for public surfaces, result qualification, sponsor-bound agent authority, traceable agent runs/handoff, manifest honesty, advisory world-model artifacts, and request-layer artifacts.
Selected CP6 synthetic hostile runtime stub passed 15 specified cases and produced blocked-action/result-qualification traces.
CP9 synthetic farmer-value UX scenario conformance passed 11 positive scenarios and detected 6 negative policy cases.
The package is implementation-directed with bounded debt and ready for implementation continuation under the stated claim limits.
blockedClaims: two-agent compatibility as a general/platform claim
world-model output as compliance basis by itself
request as blocker without explicit external basis
evidenceRequiredForStrongerClaims: production runtime implementation with policy logs and trace retrieval under load
full Phase 9 hostile suite execution with expected blocked-action traces
live revocation/recheck telemetry for sharing, handoff, answer generation, and offline sync replay
post-deployment monitoring plan and observed drift/invalidation handling
farmer pilot evidence for stale-data comprehension, request burden, dispute reconstruction, and qualified output comprehension
jurisdiction/profile-specific legal/regulatory review before legal or external-standard claims
preservedBoundaries: Compliance Twin and Advisory Twin only
no hidden truth or hidden governance
no tool-call success as governance success
no manifest as authority or safety proof
no handoff authority transfer without explicit authority
no world-model state as current state
no request as evidence/obligation/blocker by itself
